channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Impeached South Korean president to appear in court hearing to argue against his arrest
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — South Korea’s impeached president will appear at a hearing in a Seoul court on Saturday to oppose a formal arrest over last month’s imposition of martial law, his lawyers said.
item.dc:creator: KIM TONG-HYUNG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New Jersey teacher charged with allegedly sexually assaulting former student, having his child
item.description: A New Jersey teacher is facing charges after police say she is accused of sexually abusing one of her students and having his child.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Cristelli, NewsNation

item.title: Smoke from fire at California lithium battery plant raises concerns about air quality
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A fire at the world’s largest battery storage plant in Northern California smoldered Friday after sending plumes of toxic smoke into the atmosphere, leading to the evacuation of up to 1,500 people. The blaze also shook up the young battery storage industry.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ and ISABELLA O'MALLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Middle East latest: Israel's full Cabinet approves the Gaza ceasefire and hostage release deal
item.description: Israel's Cabinet has approved the Gaza ceasefire deal that would pause the fighting and release dozens of hostages held by militants, along with Palestinians imprisoned by Israel. The approval came early on Saturday after a marathon session by the full Cabinet.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kevin O'Leary says he's offering $20B cash for TikTok
item.description: Investor Kevin O’Leary, widely known as a star from “Shark Tank,” said he offered TikTok’s owners $20 billion in cash to buy the platform during a Friday appearance on Fox News’s “America’s Newsroom.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KREX 5

item.title: A battery plant fire in California started during a boom for energy storage
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — A fire at one of the world’s largest battery plants in Northern California contained tens of thousands of lithium batteries that store power from renewable energy and have become a growing electricity source.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY and NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: This fast-food restaurant has the ‘best’ chicken nuggets, new report says
item.description: (KTLA) — Chick-fil-A, often the go-to place for many to get chicken sandwiches, is also the best place to get chicken nuggets, according to the Washington Post.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Yellen says Treasury will use 'extraordinary measures' on Jan. 21 to prevent hitting debt ceiling
item.description: In one of her last acts as Treasury Secretary, Janet Yellen says her agency will start taking “extraordinary measures,” or special accounting maneuvers intended to prevent the nation from hitting the debt ceiling, on January 21, in a letter sent to congressional leaders Friday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Busta Rhymes turns himself in after fight with man in NYC, police say
item.description: Trevor Tanhiem Smith, Jr., 52, also known as Busta Rhymes, is accused of punching a man in the face during a fight last week, police said.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Joan Plowright, Tony Award-winning British actor and widow of Laurence Olivier, dies at 95
item.description: Award-winning British actor Joan Plowright, who with her late husband Laurence Olivier did much to revitalize the U.K.'s theatrical scene in the decades after World War II, has died. She was 95.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ramaswamy plans run for Ohio governor
item.description: Vivek Ramaswamy, the co-chair of President-elect Trump's new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), plans to run for governor of Ohio, two sources confirmed to The Hill on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, KRON4

item.title: College students accused of online 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: Six Assumption University students were in court to face charges in a connection made between a Holyoke woman and a man on Tinder, which resulted in a TikTok plot to confront a falsely accused sexual predator.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Shook, KRON4

item.title: Florida jury says CNN defamed Navy veteran in story about endangered Afghans
item.description: A jury in Panama City, Florida, on Friday found that CNN defamed a U.S. Navy veteran in a 2021 story about people paid to rescue endangered Afghans following the Taliban takeover of the country.
item.dc:creator: David Bauder, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mel Gibson 'surprised' to be named Hollywood envoy
item.description: Mel Gibson said he was stunned to be appointed a special envoy to Hollywood under the upcoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: City bus comes within inches of disaster on elevated overpass during rush hour
item.description: Video captured a New York City commuter bus dangling on the edge of an overpass in the Bronx on Friday morning after the driver collided with a stone wall.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump wants one of the agents who covered him after he was shot to lead the Secret Service
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump will choose to lead the U.S. Secret Service one of the agents who covered him after a gunmen opened fire at the candidate during a campaign rally in Pennsylvania. Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden got an Oval Office letter from Trump and may leave one in the desk himself. It’d be a first
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Ronald Reagan probably didn't realize he was starting a tradition when he wrote a note congratulating his successor and left it in the Oval Office desk drawer after two terms as president. He did that for George H.W. Bush, his successor and vice president of eight years.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden got an Oval Office letter from Trump and may leave one in the desk himself
item.description: Ronald Reagan probably didn't realize he was starting a tradition when he wrote a note congratulating his successor and left it in the Oval Office desk drawer after two terms as president.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden admin announces last round of student debt relief
item.description: The Biden administration announced its final round of student debt relief on Thursday, topping off the most loan forgiveness ever given in a presidency.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, ABC 4

item.title: Pepsi discontinues 'permanent' flavor, debuts a completely different one
item.description: Pepsi is planning to debut a brand-new flavor this month, marking its first “permanent” addition to the brand’s beverage portfolio in four years.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Mel Gibson ‘just as surprised’ as anyone to be named Trump ‘special envoy’ to Hollywood
item.description: Actor and film producer Mel Gibson said he was stunned to be appointed a special envoy to Hollywood under the upcoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, ABC 4

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg to host Trump for black-tie reception
item.description: Zuckerberg, along with a collection of pro-sports team owners, is hosting the event on the evening of Inauguration Day.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Mud, debris slide splits hillside home that survived Palisades Fire in half
item.description: A hillside home overlooking the Pacific Ocean that survived the devastating Palisades Fire has split in half from a landslide directly behind the property.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC

item.title: California is years behind in implementing a law to make homes more fire resistant
item.description: California is years behind in implementing a 2020 law aiming to make it harder for homes to burn during a wildfire.
item.dc:creator: Trân Nguyễn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: SpaceX loses spacecraft after catching rocket booster at the launch pad in latest Starship test
item.description: SpaceX launched its Starship rocket on its latest test flight Thursday, but the spacecraft was destroyed following a thrilling booster catch back at the pad. Elon Musk’s company said Starship broke apart — what it called a “rapid unscheduled disassembly.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Driver in Texas migrant smuggling run that led to the deaths of 53 people pleads guilty
item.description: A Texas truck driver charged in the deaths of 53 migrants who rode in a sweltering tractor-trailer with no air conditioning pleaded guilty Thursday over the 2022 tragedy that became the nation's deadliest smuggling attempt across the U.S.-Mexico border. Homero Zamorano Jr.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WEBER and LISA BAUMANN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ash and other dangers mean LA area residents who fled fires a week ago won't be going home soon
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It has been more than a week since two massive fires forced tens of thousands of people to flee their homes in the Los Angeles area, and officials said Thursday residents won't be going home soon.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Top music acts announced for FireAid, a concert to support L.A. wildfire victims
item.description: The biggest names in pop, rock and country are coming together to raise funds for victims of the Palisades and Eaton wildfires and assist with the recovery.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Where are they? Help sought finding those missing after Eaton fire in California
item.description: Anyone with information about the missing individuals was asked to contact the Sheriff's Department's Missing Persons Unit at 323-890-5500.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, NewsNation

item.title: Armed L.A. residents defy evacuation orders to defend homes from wildfire looters
item.description: Amid concerns over looters targeting wildfire victims’ homes, some residents are defying evacuation orders and choosing to protect their properties instead.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KRON4

item.title: Sub-freezing temperatures, sunshine forecast for Trump inauguration
item.description: Sub-freezing temperatures and sunshine are forecast for President-elect Donald Trump’s inauguration Monday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: David Lynch, director of 'Twin Peaks,' 'Blue Velvet' and more, dies at 78, family says
item.description: David Lynch, the filmmaker and director behind such movies as “Eraserhead,” “Blue Velvet” and the TV series “Twin Peaks,” has died, his family announced in a message posted to his official Facebook page.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Drone collides with paraglider, forcing emergency landing in California
item.description: A paraglider who took off from Torrey Pines State Reserve in California was forced to make an emergency landing when a drone became entwined in his parachute.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, WGN 9

item.title: Meet the Americans who still take COVID-19 precautions seriously
item.description: Susan Scarbro stares down a bowling lane at the distant pins. She hears a sound that breaks her focus. Was that a cough? Will her mask protect her? COVID-19 remains a very present threat for the 55-year-old. Scarbro has multiple immune disorders, making her vulnerable to infection.
item.dc:creator: DEVNA BOSE and CARLA K. JOHNSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Florida grandmother who left infant in hot car found not guilty of manslaughter
item.description: A Florida grandmother was acquitted of manslaughter in the death of her 7-month-old granddaughter, but was convicted on a lesser charge.
item.dc:creator: Staci DaSilva, ABC 4

item.title: Disabled Los Angeles fire victim escaped flames in wheelchair
item.description: Galen Buckwalter, who is paralyzed from the waist down, said he watched as the glow of the wildfire raced down the San Gabriel Mountains toward their home in the foothill community of Sierra Madre.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Officials tout Gaza ceasefire, hostage deal as Israel says details still in flux
item.description: Israel and Hamas agreed to pause the devastating war in the Gaza Strip, mediators announced Wednesday, raising the possibility of winding down the deadliest and most destructive fighting between the bitter enemies.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4
